## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual test completed (if UI/content change)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add before/after screenshots for UI changes.
